top_signals.title: Few Foreign Ships Seen in Hormuz Amid Reports of Iran’s Insurance Plan
top_signals.summary: The Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed to commercial shipping, with maritime traffic reduced to a trickle and dominated by Iranian-linked vessels. There were few notable foreign-affiliated movements amid reports of Iran’s Bitcoin-backed insurance program for shipping companies willing to transit the waterway.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gold price falls back to $4,500 on heightened inflation fears
top_signals.summary: The market is now pricing in a more than 50% chance of a rate hike next January, according to Kalshi.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Gold price steadies as inflation revives higher-rate bets
top_signals.summary: Gold prices consolidate near $4,700/oz as US consumption slows, aligning with market expectations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations affecting rate path and global bond markets.

top_signals.title: Agnico to invest $10B in Ontario operations, province says
top_signals.summary: About C$2 billion of Agnico’s planned C$14 billion outlay will go toward the Detour Lake underground project.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Appian deepens Namibia push with $400M copper mine buy
top_signals.summary: Appian boosts its African mining presence by acquiring a majority stake in Namibia's Omitiomire mine amid tight copper markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations affecting rate path and global bond markets.

top_signals.title: Lithium Americas sees up to $120M tariff hit on Thacker Pass
top_signals.summary: Lithium Americas says tariffs and Middle East conflict inflation could raise Thacker Pass construction costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations affecting rate path and global bond markets.

top_signals.title: China’s grip on rare earths remains tight amid Xi-Trump showdown
top_signals.summary: Exports of yttrium, dysprosium and terbium are still down roughly 50% compared to the 12 months preceding the controls, customs data showed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump leaves Beijing with no rare earth deal confirmed
top_signals.summary: Rare earths had emerged as one of the most closely watched topics of Trump's two-day summit in China.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hemlo hits 16g gold at namesake Ontario mine
top_signals.summary: Hemlo is about one-fifth of the way through a 130,000-metre exploration drilling program planned for 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and supply chains.

top_signals.title: Larvotto Resources reports recoverable antimony, gold from tailings at Hillgrove
top_signals.summary: Initial flotation testwork on TSF1 tailings achieved 80–95% antimony and 40–75% gold recoveries, the company said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and supply chains.

top_signals.title: Codelco faces questions over 20,000-tonne output gap
top_signals.summary: Preliminary audit findings raise fresh governance concerns at Codelco as Chile seeks tighter oversight of the state copper miner.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and supply chains.

top_signals.title: Titan, Teck team up to explore germanium recovery from zinc mine waste
top_signals.summary: The companies will assess the potential recovery of approximately 13,000 kg/year of germanium.

alerts.summary: None of the projects have secured free, prior and informed consent from affected Indigenous Peoples, Amnesty argues.

alerts.title: First Quantum says Panama has lost $3.5B from mine halt
alerts.summary: Report shows that Panama has lost billions in economic activity as it keeps Cobre Panamá mine operations suspended.

alerts.title: Honda halts $11B Ontario plant amid losses
alerts.summary: The site was designed to produce as many as 240,000 vehicles a year by the end of the decade.

alerts.title: Nouveau Monde to proceed with G7’s biggest graphite mine
alerts.summary: The project is expected to produce about 106,000 tonnes of graphite concentrate annually over an estimated mine life of more than 25 years.

alerts.title: Water shortages are quietly killing mining projects — new tech rises to fix it
alerts.summary: For decades, water sat at the periphery of mining analysis—a logistical consideration, but rarely a dealbreaker. That has changed.

alerts.title: MAX Power Mining, Moose Jaw to advance natural hydrogen commercialization
alerts.summary: In January, MAX Power identified a robust target for drill testing of a second natural hydrogen discovery in Saskatchewan.

alerts.title: Trilogy’s Arctic project gains acceptance into FAST-41 program
alerts.summary: The milestone follows the company's recent application for a water permit with the US Army Corps of Engineers.

alerts.title: EU ban on Russian uranium to boost Canadian exports
alerts.summary: Europe’s effort to curb Russian nuclear fuel dependence is creating new long-term opportunities for Cameco and other Western suppliers.

alerts.title: Op-Ed: Bankable rules matter as much as critical minerals
alerts.summary: Greenland’s Kvanefjeld dispute underscores how regulatory uncertainty can undermine Western critical-minerals ambitions.
